message:
refactor(extract): consolidate multipart extractor into core crate

Moved the multipart form data extraction logic from
fastapi-http/src/multipart.rs (909 lines) into
fastapi-core/src/extract.rs as a proper FromRequest extractor:

- Added MultipartExtractError with typed variants
  (UnsupportedMediaType, BadRequest, PayloadTooLarge, ReadError)
- Integrated with the FromRequest trait for ergonomic handler usage
- Reduced fastapi-http multipart module to thin re-export layer
- 186 insertions in extract.rs, 905 deletions from http multipart.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
